title: Confetti Cannon
description: This mods adds the Confetti Cannon. It deals knockback, so punch your friends around!
body:
### Confetti Cannon
This little mod adds a Confetti Cannon, with Knockback! I made the mod with little expreience and it's my first public available Minecraft Mod. made for the ModFest:Toybox

### Features:
- The Confetti Cannon Item

### Usage:
Get the Confetti Cannon from the Creative Tab Tools and Utillity. Then you can use it with right click. If you target a player, the player gets knocked in the direction your looking.
This can be used for some Minigames or trolling your friends.

made with ❤️ by traxonlp
